recommended.song_name: Somebody That I Used To Know

content:
Artist: La Roux
Song title: Bulletproof


[Intro]

[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  x2


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Been there, done that, messed around[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I'm having fun, don't put me down[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
I'll never let you sweep me off my feet[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
I won't let you in again[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]
The messages I've tried to send[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
My information's just not goin in[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Burning bridges, shore to shore[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I break away from something more[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                   [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm not to, not to love until it's cheap[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Been there, done that, messed around[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I'm having fun, don't put me down[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
I'll never let you sweep me off my feet[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
This time baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
I'll be Bulletproof[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
This time baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
I'll be Bulletproof[/tab]


[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  x2


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
I won't let you turn around,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I'll tell you now, I'm much too proud[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                     [ch]Em[/ch]
To walk away from something when it's dead[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Do do do your dirty words[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Come out to play when you are hurt[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                          [ch]Em[/ch]
There's certain things that should be left unsaid[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Tick tick tick tick on the watch[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Life's too short for me to stop[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
Oh baby, your time is running out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
I won't let you turn around[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
And tell me now, I'm much too proud[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]
All you do is fill me up with doubt[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
This time baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
I'll be Bulletproof[/tab]
